title: balance() includes notes with plaintext but no witness row
description: balance() queries FROM notes WHERE spent=0 with no JOIN on witnesses. A note row with all three plaintext columns (note_diversifier, note_pk_d, note_rseed) populated but no matching witnesses row appears in balance() but is excluded from spendable_notes() (which uses INNER JOIN witnesses). Trigger: insert_note() called without a subsequent upsert_witness(), or external deletion of a witnesses row. Result: wallet shows a positive spendable balance but send_payment returns NoSpendableNotes. Distinct from nie-kef6.6 which covers NULL-plaintext stub notes.
